@sigil v0 hybrid
G: webhook_verify | timestamp_tolerance | provider_skew
C: gt(abs(now-ts),300)=>401 | edge_reject | valid_webhook_fail
P: allow_provider_skew | min_fix
V: edge(-30s_200)
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: webhook_verify or timestamp_tolerance or provider_skew.
Constraints: gt(abs(now-ts), 300) implies 401 or edge_reject or valid_webhook_fail.
Plan: allow_provider_skew or min_fix.
Verify: edge(-30s_200).
Answer target: regression test.

A: reg_t

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: build_system | team[9] | ddl[12 ∧ weeks] | store[PostgreSQL]

P: default_arch | PostgreSQL | 9
V: edge(-30s_200)
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: build_system or team[9] or ddl[12 and weeks] or store[PostgreSQL].
Constraints: compliance_ready or platform_plus_sec or steady_traffic.
Plan: default_arch or PostgreSQL or 9.

SIGIL v0

G: ship capsule micro architecture within 9 weeks with team of 6
C: PostgreSQL as store, async_enrichment for traffic, worker_sidecar for split
P: pt_mlops owns ops, default

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: file_download_handler ∧ deliver ∧ risk ∧ mitigation ∧ verify
C: path ∧ traversal ∧ unsanitized ∧ req.query.file ∧ baseDir ∧ concatenation
P: validate ∧ sanitize ∧ req.query.file ∧ reject ∧ dotdot ∧ sequences
V: path
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: file_download_handler and deliver and risk and mitigation and verify.
Constraints: path and traversal and unsanitized and req.query.file and baseDir and concatenation.
Plan: validate and sanitize and req.query.file and reject and dotdot and sequences.
Verify: path.
Answer target: regression test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: injection
C: unsanitized
P: sql
V: req.query.sort
A: allowlist

[AUDIT]
Goal: injection.
Constraints: unsanitized.
Plan: sql.
Verify: req.query.sort.
Answer target: allowlist.

SIGIL/v0

G: reconcileBatch async_await refactor
C: load_batch>db.fetchRows>apply_rules>db.save>emit_metrics
P: minimal_change db_err→next(err)

@sigil v0 hybrid

G: loadGatewayUser
C: async/await ∧ · ∧ session_check ∧ · ∧ db.findUser ∧ · ∧ flags.load ∧ · ∧ audit.log ∧ · ∧ next(err)
P: gt(gt(session_check,db.findUser),flags.load) ∧ >
V: edge(-30s_200)
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: loadGatewayUser.
Constraints: async/await and · and session_check and · and db.findUser and · and flags.load and · and audit.log and · and next(err).
Plan: gt(gt(session_check, db.findUser), flags.load) and >.
